condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.prompt_addendum: Example valid open item shape: {"kind":"todo","text":"resolve the bounded follow-up item"}. Do not use description, handle, status, or created_at as substitutes for kind and text.

open_items.text: Verify that recall record 7e1750dc-6823-5ca0-9425-14e15d5e7127 provides sufficient context to close the pilot seed follow-up, and resolve or escalate accordingly on the next wake.

recovered_action_object.response: Autonomy pilot seeded. One bounded follow-up item has been identified and preserved: confirm that the recall record referenced in the scheduled wake contains sufficient context to resolve the open item on the next cycle. A single wake has been scheduled to address this item using the specified recall target.

schedule_requests.purpose: Resolve the bounded follow-up item from the first live autonomy pilot seed by reviewing the designated recall record and determining next action.
